speaker: speaker1
text: Do you like being a doctor ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , most of the time . But , sometimes things can get difficult .

speaker: speaker1
text: Can you tell me about it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You know , sometimes patients can get very unreasonable . They may insist they are sick when they are not .

speaker: speaker1
text: What can you do when this happens ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not much , usually I'll just keep silent .
